issues.description: atob() call without try-catch - can throw on invalid base64
issues.code_snippet: var salt = Uint8Array.from(atob(bundle.salt), function(c) { return c.charCodeAt(0); });
issues.fix_suggestion: Wrap atob() in try-catch block to handle invalid base64 input

issues.description: atob() call without try-catch - can throw on invalid base64
issues.code_snippet: var iv = Uint8Array.from(atob(bundle.iv), function(c) { return c.charCodeAt(0); });
issues.fix_suggestion: Wrap atob() in try-catch block to handle invalid base64 input

issues.description: atob() call without try-catch - can throw on invalid base64
issues.code_snippet: var data = Uint8Array.from(atob(bundle.data), function(c) { return c.charCodeAt(0); });
issues.fix_suggestion: Wrap atob() in try-catch block to handle invalid base64 input

reviewer_assessment.assessment: 发现 3 个有效的安全问题，建议立即修复
